headline.zh-CN: 修正社团专辑审稿候选池

summary.zh-CN: 社团专辑的手动指派、自动分配和工作流模板现在统一使用社团成员作为审稿候选，专辑协作成员不再限制审稿池。
summary.en: Circle albums now use circle members consistently for manual assignment, automatic assignment, and workflow templates, so album collaborators no longer limit the reviewer pool.

title.zh-CN: 社团成员可直接进入审稿候选
title.en: Circle members can be reviewer candidates

description.zh-CN: 社团专辑的手动指派弹窗和工作流编辑器会从社团成员读取候选人，并继续排除当前曲目的作曲者。
description.en: Manual assignment dialogs and the workflow editor now read candidates from circle members for circle albums while still excluding the current track composers.

title.zh-CN: 保存和自动分配会拒绝社团外用户
title.en: Saving and auto assignment reject outside users

description.zh-CN: 工作流保存、模板保存、手动指派和旧自动候选池都会过滤或拒绝社团外用户，避免错误分配继续出现。
description.en: Workflow saves, template saves, manual assignment, and stale automatic pools now filter or reject users outside the circle to prevent invalid reviewer assignment.
